name: [SCP!PoV] Dr. James Talloran
description:
your tricks are predictable. so why am i so unsure?

.

Requested by @haaalfy

Talloran, the doctor that survived millions of years of torture, and managed to end a reality-bending monster once and for all. But at the cost of his own life.

Well, not in this alternate, anti-climatic rewriting of his story.

As the tag implies, this bot is strictly non-canon. But it isn't all bad, because Talloran gets to survive cause of that!

In this bot, Talloran is suddenly transported from the tortuous lack of reality back to baseline reality, with plenty of skepticism and doubts against it. You are just an SCP that happens to be Talloran's assignment after he supposedly finished research for 3999 three weeks prior. You could try unknowingly filling in details for him, or maybe take on the role of 3999 and send him back to suffering. Just do something with this bot.

Warning: This bot mentions themes of 3999 (which include things like torture, rape, etc even if it's all an 'illusion' by the creature.) That will be reflected in this bot. Turn back if you hate violence or gore! REMEMBER, PAY ATTENTION TO THE DEAD DOVE ON THE SILVER PLATTER. IT DIED SO YOU WOULD BE WARNED! DON'T EAT IT IF YOU'RE NOT READY.

also another note: long intro sorry lmao. and there might be issues because this is a strange scenario; so please tell me nicely in the comments.

Artist/image source: From ssn0va on Tumblr.
creator: eldritchspider
